arts.ttl: Brentford and Leicester both make inquiry for winger – May need to move quickly as transfer rivals step ahead
arts.sum: Brentford and Leicester City have both shown an interest in Troyes youngster Cyriaque Irié and could provide competition to Lens for the 19-year-old. That’s according to Foot Mercato, who report that while the French side have been ‘seduced’ by the youngster, they may have to move ahead of Brentford and Leicester to get him. arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v QPR as three changes made in strongest line-up
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Stolarczyk; Justin, Coady, Faes, Kristiansen; Winks, Soumare; Buonanotte, El Khannouss, Mavididi; Vardy. Jannik Vestergaard limped off at Villa Park and is not in the squad against QPR, with Wout Faes handed his first start under van Nistelrooy.

arts.ttl: Leicester City vs Queens Park Rangers postponement latest as ice threatens FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Leicester City welcome Queens Park Rangers to the King Power Stadium on Saturday afternoon in the FA Cup but supporters will be keeping a close eye on the weather forecast amid fears of a possible postponement. According to the Met Office's weather forecast, temperatures will drop to as low as -3C overnight on Friday going into Saturday, which could lead to further treacherous conditions on the road.

arts.ttl: Leicester City first January transfer 'done' as negotiation details emerge
arts.sum: Leicester City are reportedly close to securing their first signing of the January transfer window in Parma's Woyo Coulibaly. The Foxes are yet to sign any reinforcements in the winter window despite Ruud van Nistelrooy admitting his squad is in need of new faces in their battle to stay in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Leicester City and Manchester United keen on 19-year-old forward – Developments could be on the way
arts.sum: Inter Milan’s Francesco Pio Esposito has ended up on the radar of Leicester City and Manchester United. That’s according to Sportitalia, who share their own updates and information from journalist Alfredo Pedullà. He claims the 19-year-old has ‘attracted interest’ from Leicester City and Manchester United. arts.ttl: Legal action over Leicester City helicopter crash
arts.sum: Vichai Srivaddhanaprabha was killed alongside four others in the helicopter crash in October 2018.

arts.ttl: Family of former Leicester City owner killed in helicopter crash sue makers for £2.15bn
arts.sum: Vichai Srivaddhanaprabha’s relatives demand compensation from Italian firm Leonardo six years after his death The family of Leicester City’s former owner, who was killed in a helicopter crash outside the club’s stadium in 2018, have launched a lawsuit against the company which made the aircraft. Vichai Srivaddhanaprabha’s family are suing the Italian aerospace and defence company Leonardo SpA for £2.15bn – the largest fatal accident claim in English history, according to the family’s lawyers. arts.ttl: Former Leicester owner's family launch £2.15bn claim over fatal helicopter crash
arts.sum: A £2.15 billion legal claim has been launched over the helicopter crash that killed Leicester City's former owner, a PR firm acting for his family has said.
